case_title: WILLIAMS A.A. VS LASER CARLA J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,970.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS A.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LASER CARLA J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LASER CARLA J.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LASER CARLA J. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAMS A.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS A.A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS A.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LASER CARLA J. $2,770.00 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,793.00, DEFENDANT ALLOWED $800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LASER CARLA J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAMS A.A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
